sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, expr_result DOUBLE, str_val VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, expr_result, str_val) VALUES (1, 2.0, exp(2.0), '10'), (2, NULL, exp(NULL), 'NULL'), (3, -1.5, exp(-1.5), '5');
SELECT id, value, expr_result, exp(value ^ 3) AS complex_exp FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, (exp(value) ^ (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data WHERE value > 0)) AS nested_exp FROM test_data WHERE str_val = '10' HAVING nested_exp IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, expr_result, exp(NULLIF(value, 0)) AS safe_exp FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE join_test (join_id INT PRIMARY KEY, join_value DOUBLE);
SELECT td.id, td.value, (exp(td.value) ^ jt.join_value) AS xor_exp FROM test_data td JOIN join_test jt ON td.id = jt.join_id;
SELECT td.id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY exp(td.value)) AS partition_count FROM test_data td GROUP BY exp(td.value) HAVING partition_count > 1;
SELECT id, str_val, exp(value) AS exp_val FROM test_data WHERE exp(value) < (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data) ORDER BY exp(value) DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_data ADD COLUMN new_col INT DEFAULT 10;
UPDATE test_data SET new_col = exp(value) ^ 5 WHERE new_col IS NOT NULL;
